text:
Abuse Treatment Facility. A location which provides treatment for 
substance (alcohol and drug) abuse on an ambulatory basis. Services include individual and 
group therapy and counseling, family counseling, laboratory tests, drugs and supplies, and 
psychological testing. 

58 = Unassigned. N/A 

59 = Unassigned. N/A 

60 = Mass Immunization Center. A location where providers administer pneumococcal pneumonia 
and influenza virus vaccinations and submit these services as electronic media
